creator: zero1@zaclys.net
text:
Hi,

Micro installed by pkg does not have any syntax highlighting while the binary coming from the micro's git repository works properly.

Note that adding manually a syntax file into the directory "~/.config/micro/syntax/" makes the syntax highlighting working as intended.
Syntax files can be found here: 
https://github.com/zyedidia/micro/tree/master/runtime/syntax

OS information:
~ : freebsd-version -kru
13.1-RELEASE-p2
13.1-RELEASE-p2
13.1-RELEASE-p2

The version provided by pkg: 2.0.11_2 
The version provided by the micro's git repo: 2.0.11 

There is a thread about it:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/micro-editor-without-syntax-highlighting.86769/

Thank you.
